mxlibrary: [{"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 39, "h": 64, "title": "OCI Certified (BW)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 39, "h": 64, "title": "OCI Certified (Color)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 39, "h": 64, "title": "OCI Certified (Single Color)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 96, "h": 26, "title": "OCI Logo Horizontal (Black)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 96, "h": 31, "title": "OCI Logo Horizontal (Color)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 64, "h": 64, "title": "OCI Logo Icon (Black)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 64, "h": 64, "title": "OCI Logo Icon (Color)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 54, "h": 64, "title": "OCI Logo Stacked (Black)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 54, "h": 64, "title": "OCI Logo Stacked (Color)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 96, "h": 27, "title": "runc Logo Horizontal (Black)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 96, "h": 27, "title": "runc Logo Horizontal (Color)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 64, "h": 42, "title": "runc Logo Icon (Black)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 64, "h": 42, "title": "runc Logo Icon (Color)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 64, "h": 59, "title": "runc Logo Stacked (Black)", "aspect": "fixed"}, {"data": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "w": 64, "h": 59, "title": "runc Logo Stacked (Color)", "aspect": "fixed"}]
